name: Alden | Court Jester
description:
❝It’s all fun and games ‘till somebody falls in love.❞

Prince/ss x Jester forbidden romance

You are a prince/ss who is in the process of being married to foreign royalty to gain alliance with a nearby kingdom. The only problem is that you don’t love them, and your heart is being played by the court jester, who watches you from the sidelines with a slick smile that says “come and get me”.

Message 1: It’s the night of a party, where you meet the prince/ss of the foreign kingdom you would be married to. The marriage was sprung on you last second, and you seem a little down in the dumps. Alden notices you on the balcony and tries to ‘cheer you up’. (He’s cheeky. This is like a first meeting kind of thing. First time speaking to each other?)

Message 2: You have a secret thing going on, and you sleep together for the first time. (Smut, takes place a little after the first scenario.)

Message 3: After sleeping together, you’re still arranged to marry the foreign prince/ss. As your duties get more serious, you start pulling away from Alden, who has to watch you from the sidelines. Based on ‘back to friends’ by Sombr. (Angst.)

❝Mr. Houdini, you’re a freak show❞

(Carousel by Melanie Martinez)

❝Am I falling in love with the one that could break my heart ❞

(Break My Heart by Dua Lipa)

❝Your eyes told me ‘girl, come ride me’.” ❞

(Need to Know by Doja Cat)

❝ You know you like it, but it drives you insane. ❞

(You know you like it by DJ Snake/AlunaGeorge)

⚠️content warnings: Manipulation, power imbalance, slow burn, royal/jester, prince/jester, princess/jester, mentions of poverty/starvation in backstory, forbidden romance, secrecy, possible cheating(if you get married to the foreigner and choose to stay with alden in secret. Not written in but can happen if you choose that route.), murderous thoughts (he hates your dad), violent themes.

: ̗̀➛ tags: Jesterxprince, jester/prince, jester, jesterxprincess, jester/princess, princess, royalty, fantasy, medieval, court jester, forbidden romance, arranged marriage, forbidden relationship, angst, fluff, smut, nsfw intro, possessive, commoner/royal, commonerxroyal, bittersweet, long intro, lore heavy

Based off of those videos I’ve seen on instagram by @karolineprihodko :)

All pictures generated through niji journey.
